storyInfo: Moriuchi gives Hoshiguma and Momoka directions to a shrine, where they meet an unruffled kannushi, and ultimately grasp the truth of the 'Wanyuudou's' true form—a kami of the Higashinese belief system.

attributes.content: What was that broadcast about?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I-I don't know!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Did Kinbee used to be a TV host or something?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kinbee?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Mifune.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: When I was little? I think I remember something like that.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I heard Mifune used to helm every program on the Kinseki Channel in its early days. News, variety shows, and sometimes he'd make a guest appearance on the weather channel too.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Come to think of it, I even helped them do a few of those long weather forecasts.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Later on when Kinseki Channel expanded, he only did breaking news, and as time went on, eventually disappeared off camera.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: So, what he wants now is—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yo, that bike over there!
attributes.name: Sharp-eyed Passerby

attributes.content: The Ao-Oni?!
attributes.name: Restless Passerby

attributes.content: She's really with Momoka!
attributes.name: Restless Passerby

attributes.content: So, should we stop them?
attributes.name: Restless Passerby

attributes.content: You got a death wish?! Call the news!
attributes.name: Sharp-eyed Passerby

attributes.content: Just look her sobbing, I bet the Ao-Oni kidnapped her... maybe she's doing some mind control stuff too!
attributes.name: Sharp-eyed Passerby

attributes.content: You call the news station, I'll get the cops.
attributes.name: Restless Passerby

attributes.content: Didn't the cops issue a bunch of notices saying we shouldn't treat them like the Spiritual Affairs people and not to bother them for kaidan stuff?
attributes.name: Sharp-eyed Passerby

attributes.content: Oh yeah.
attributes.name: Restless Passerby

attributes.content: Gah, we should speed up.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka is going as fast as she can, but Hoshiguma still feels her vision only repeats some sort of gigantic loop.
Neon lights, pedestrians, skyscrapers, road crossings. Neon lights, pedestrians, skyscrapers, road crossings—
After some time, the loop finally breaks, and old neighborhoods like Kajimachi begin to show up in her view as the number of buildings grows sparse.
They eventually give way to large patches of wilderness bearing traces of construction work and outright abandoned plates.
The sky gradually brightens.
Hoshiguma-san, the place is right up ahead.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Alright—wait, you should slow down—we're gonna hit the gate at this rate!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Huh?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka hits the brake hard, but it is too late—
The scooter zooms into the shrine, only stopping right in the middle of the garden. Thanks to Momoka's excellent balance, the two are spared from being thrown off the vehicle.
Oh no, what if they think we're being rude...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kannushi-sama! A woman's fighting her way in again! She's on a bike this time!
attributes.name: Shrine Maiden Voice

attributes.content: Again?!
attributes.name: Shrine Priest's Voice

attributes.content: I don't know why, but no one's stopping her—them, I mean, and they're right in center courtyard!
attributes.name: Shrine Maiden Voice

attributes.content: 'Them'?
attributes.name: Unruffled Voice

attributes.content: Check and see if it's a Vulpo, won't you?
attributes.name: Unruffled Voice

attributes.content: Er...
attributes.name: Shrine Maiden Voice

attributes.content: A Vulpo? No, it's an Ægir and an Oni.
attributes.name: Shrine Priest's Voice

attributes.content: They brought back terrible memories of last time, and I didn't look at them clearly in my panic, sorry...
attributes.name: Shrine Maiden Voice

attributes.content: It's not your fault that concern wrecked your nerves.
attributes.name: Unruffled Voice

attributes.content: Whoever our guests may be, I'll simply entertain them. The rest of you, calm down and focus on your own work.
attributes.name: Unruffled Voice

attributes.content: I'm so sorry! I didn't mean to do this! I was just so nervous I forgot to use the brake—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I was wondering who it was. Are you not Momoka-san?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: K-Kannushi-sama...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Uh, you know each other?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka-san used to be a regular visitor here. She last came five years ago, and I thought perhaps her wishes came true and that she was now living a happy life.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: No, not really... I just got so busy that I no longer had the time to visit.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No need to be sad. This is the Kizuna Jinja after all. You found success in your career, so I'm sure you formed lots of ties and connections with others.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: *Cries*...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: May I know how to call Momoka's friend here?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: I'm Hoshiguma. Looking for someone.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Whom, may I ask? The shrine is quite bereft of clergy.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: No, I'm not looking for a priest. I came here to find a 'kami-sama' for somebody.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Specifically, I'm looking for a unicycle with an invisible rider. I guess people in Mitsukue call it 'Wanyuudou'. Is it really a kami?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: If they were looking to establish some sort of connection or looking for a blessing, I'm afraid they should come here themselves. Prayers made on someone else's behalf will not work.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: He just wants to meet the kami. Didn't seem to care much about the forming ties or getting blessed type of thing.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Moriuchi-kun is truly a stubborn one... No, I should praise him for his tenacity.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: You know him?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: He's the one who insisted on meeting a specific kami with no want of blessing. We've become quite well-acquainted over the years.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: So this means you can help him find the kami, right?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Nah, Moriuchi asking us to do it for him means the priest failed.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It is as you say. We priests cannot do anything if the kami themselves are unwilling to appear.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Well, the two of you haven't technically disrespected the shrine, other than driving your scooter onto our grounds.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Wh-What should we do? Do I have to apologize to the kami-sama? How do I do that?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Let me think... To appease the kami's anger, please go over to the omamori stall there and buy a full set.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Then go to the hundred-mon omikuji and draw fortunes until you get one each of 'sue-kichi', 'chu-kichi', 'dai-kichi'. It's alright if you draw any of the others—unless you get 'dai-kyou'—then you'll have to start over.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Eh?!
attributes.name: Momoka
Unruffled Priest
attributes.content: —Finally...

attributes.name: Unruffled Priest
attributes.content: I'm just joking. The kami would never punish someone over a scooter.
Wha—?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I pray the two of you will obtain what you truly desire here. Now, plenty of divine work awaits me, so I shall take my leave.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Phew! I was worried I wouldn't have enough mon for all that!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Seems like the kannushi isn't going to get in our way, so things are going pretty well for us.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Let's take it easy. Why not go over to the omikuji section for a break, while I look around the place?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Um... that works.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hoshiguma slowly goes around the vacant shrine grounds.
She knows so little about shrines and Shinto she cannot even tell if it's a 'honden', 'haiden', or 'heiden' standing before her.
The only things resembling Moriuchi's keychain are the two statues behind the stone lanterns that were obviously based on Perro Beast Stewards.
But the breeze here is cool, and she cannot help but to recall her youth when she visited a monastery with her father.
Her father and Tessai's figures appear and disappear between the pine and cypress trees, and the abbot pats her head and she hears the tale of the first Oni.
That Oni's name seems to be... 'Qui'lon'...
Hoshiguma-san, Hoshiguma-san!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What's up?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's bad!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You got a 'dai-kyou'?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, a 'sue-kichi'—no, I didn't mean that! I mean, I heard something!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The Wanyuudou?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't know! Maybe, but what if... it's a ghost...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: A ghost showing up this early in the morning might be some sort of super scary evil spirits, like onryo!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: We should trust the kannushi a little. You think he'd let evil spirits in here?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: True, but—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There's that sound again!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Calm down.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ugh, it's not like I could do that on command, even if I wanted to...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I didn't expect It'd actually show up here. There's tracks on the ground...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The unicycle seems to realize Its tracks are giving It away, and turns toward the stone pavement.
Wh-What do we do?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Isn't this better for us? Now It's locked onto the stone pavement.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But... how is a kami unable to hide Its own tire tracks...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What... do you mean... unable!
I-It spoke?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Behind the Beast Steward statue! Momoka, you're closer to It, over there!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't see It? Where did It go?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No, It circled around to your back—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: My... back?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Eek! A g-g-g-ghost's after me?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Misfortune befalls anyone who sees the Wanyuudou, but It's actually chasing me—is my life over?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Instantly, the girl and unicycle seem to change positions, the latter now hot on Momoka's heels, as if she was being chased by It from the very start.
Momoka, hold still!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: S-STILL?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She does not grasp what is happening, but still subconsciously stops her steps.
Hoshiguma snatches the chance to hurl Hannya out, and the giant triangular shield blocks the unicycle's path, forcing It to brake.
Now keep holding position, Momoka! I'll catch It. Don't, and I mean it, don't panic if It runs toward you!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: O-O-Okay!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hoshiguma closes in on the unicycle, blocking It from any easy escape routes.
It stops in Its tracks as the handlebars twist left and right—perhaps It does not know where to go, although it is no difficult decision.
On one side is a tall Oni, while on the other stands an Ægir It has just chased all over the place...
The pedals spin frantically, and the unicycle speeds straight for Momoka.
Momoka, grab It!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The unicycle dashes toward her, and Momoka's instinct screams at her to turn and run. But she keeps it a thought and does not move her legs.
Yabai. There's no other way, it's over, it's all over—such thoughts flood her mind as she stands there like a fowlbeast in headlights.
The unicycle approaches.
According to the kaidan tales, she is doomed—wait, that's not right. Wasn't she already down on her luck before running into the Wanyuudou?
Or maybe, if she hadn't run into Hoshiguma at the oden yatai, she would long since—
Momoka gulps, looks at Hoshiguma, then at the unicycle only a few steps away from her—
Instead of retreating, she jumps forward.
Kannushi-sama, someone's disgraced the shrine by... jumping... into the pond...
attributes.name: Familiar Voice

attributes.content: Momoka? Hoshiguma too?
attributes.name: Familiar Voice

attributes.content: I don't know what's going on, but Ill help you two out! Forgive me, Kannushi-sama!
attributes.name: Familiar Voice

attributes.content: Hoshiguma? Kichisei?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: And...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: One side of the pond lies a small unicycle leaning against a rock, pedals still moving on their own.
The thing on the unicycle appears before her, with a cycling helmet fitted perfectly on Its head. It's bright round eyes stare somewhat helplessly at all the water dripping to the floor.
Beside her, Hoshiguma's expression softens after making sure she's alright.
She nods in greeting to the person behind her, who Momoka guesses is Kichisei, then turns to look into the distance...
No matter what happened, it seems like she's finally accomplished something?
So, in the end... It was a ghost after all?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Have you ever seen a ghost that could be struck by water, girl?
Besides, it was just a round of hide-and-seek. Why were you going at it so seriously?
S-Seriously?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You looked like your life was on the line when you went into the pond with me.
Same goes for Moriuchi too. A kami I may be, but what makes him so sure a random god he finds on the streets is bound to be his maneki-neko?
Momoka, do you want me to lure the priest away? Or—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: No, it's alright. The person we're looking for—no, the 'kami' we're looking for is right here.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Relax, I'm already right before your eyes. No more running for me.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I'll watch over you, and no one on the shrine grounds will cause you any trouble. Soak in the pond for as long as you like.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Momoka carefully places a hand on the kami, and this time It no longer dodges her. Although It fidgets to her touch, but It seems to at least hold no objections to mortal contact.
The cool breeze drags slowly across the pond, as if all that running and chasing that happened before dawn was merely a strange and messy, but not terrifying dream.
Empty handed, are you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You couldn't even catch a girl scared out of her wits at the mere mention of a kaidan?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Silent, are you? We're all family here, we can laugh all this off, yes?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That's not it, Oyabun!
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: She was with that Ao-Oni, and we weren't strong enough...
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: Weren't strong enough?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune takes a fierce step forward, face nearly coming into contact with the bold yakuza.
Colluding with Tessai to obstruct Kajimachi's development, disobeying my orders, and fleeing without permission. Even, getting mixed up with that individual...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Do you think you could get off just saying you weren't strong enough?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Oyabun, I... I...
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: Do you know what happened to Takehiko?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Y-Yes. You were forced to kill him with your own hands, and afterwards organized a grand funeral for him, even weeping as you held a memorial at his grave...
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: And who truly killed him? Was it me?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Of course it was that old bastard Tessai, he—
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: It was you! All of you! One by one, you proved your incompetence, allowing Tessai to get off scot-free, and that's how Takehiko died!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune's hand slowly reaches inside his sleeve, as if to take something out.
The gangsters dare not move until their Oyabun pulls his fist back out into the open, slowly opening it...
Several heavy gold coins fall to the ground.
Are those k-koban coins?
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: I found these in a drawer. Pick them up. They're yours now.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Arigatou, Oyabun! But what for...?
attributes.name: Bold Yakuza

attributes.content: The next time you would tell me you're not strong enough, just cut off your own arm and use these to buy you a state-of-the-art prosthetic. Am I clear?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Oyabun.
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: Speak.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Our people went northward from Nita Street and located Momoka and Hoshiguma... inside the shrine.
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: Do you hear that? The ninja I personally cultivated are more capable than you lot. Learn from them, all of you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The shrine, eh?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: A shrine. Sacred ground, unsullied land. No one will be happy if trouble occurs there.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You mean...?
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: Take this useless bunch and surround the place. But be discreet—just make sure there is no way out.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If they intend to hole up in there, send a few men in to force them outside. Don't let anyone they've had contact with off either. If you can't make a move near the shrine, do it elsewhere.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Then the clergy inside...
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: The clergy? We can't touch them yet.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Understood.
attributes.name: Prudent Ninja

attributes.content: Go. I have guests to see.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune-san...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The frost on Mifune's face does not disappear at once, but it slowly melts when he sees Tetsuya, as if somewhat comforted by a hope for a new life after much toil and tumult.
The guys who just left...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Same slackers as always. You're the hardest worker I've got.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Enough about them. How was your visit home?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The Old Man... is the same as he ever was.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Don't feel bad.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I remember where you were only this tall, standing in-between your parents as they linked hands with you...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: *Sighs* Who would have ever thought that your father would have no choice but to let go of that which was dearest to him, all for the Kinsekikai's sake...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune-san, there's no need to compliment my father. Being chairman for too long has robbed him of all human emotion.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: That can't be. The bond between parent and child is stronger than any other tie.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I used to treat your father as my own, in my younger days. Unfortunately the Old Man scorned me, and that's how our hostilities began.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But this Northern Court spy incident may prove to be an opportunity.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You mean...?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Your mother was wrongly accused because of her ambiguous relationship with an individual in the Northern Court. If you catch the spy, your father's attitude will surely improve.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: And it just so happens I have the latest intelligence in my hands.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tell me, please! No matter where the spy is, I'll root him out!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: This spy... is in Kajimachi, and is highly likely to be related to the so-called Haunted House.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No way... Hoshiguma-san?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: She—no, she has nothing to do with this, only returned here by chance.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But I can't get in there, if she stops me...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Simply go in when she's away. Kajimachi is a big town after all, and finding any additional clues will be good. Go!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: A-At once!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Mifune's expression changes again when he sees a woman enter the room after Tetsuya leaves.
Tired, weary, impatient, and a sort of confidence mixed within. A sort of certainty that everything is under control and he merely has to wait for an opportunity to strike.
